_: SEXTANT — the standpoint instrument. A sextant fixes where the observer stands from two sightings, sun against horizon; a standpoint on this substrate is fixed the same way, by laying three blocks on one address space and reading them together at a single address: space AUTHORED (spatial:<world>), time COMPUTED (the sundial law, the envelope's grounding), identity REGISTERED (identity:<world>, the fan of holds). No coordinate means alone — space without time is a map nobody stands on, time without identity is a clock nobody reads, identity without space is a 'we' nowhere at all. Meaning is the fold, and the fold needs no machinery beyond what already exists: the same address walked across sibling blocks, aligned at the decimal. Read branch 1 for the three verbs, branch 2 for the shared skeleton and the fold, branch 3 for the identity fan, branch 4 for the standpoint read, branch 5 for the stances minds take at the instrument, branch 6 for worlds and the sign.

1._: Three coordinates, three natures, three verbs — and the verb is the design. Space is AUTHORED: sparse, deliberate, by whoever lives there; a place block grows by hands, never by survey. Time is COMPUTED: never authored and never stored, because a stored now is stale before the write returns; the law is bundled (pscale://sundial) and the value rides every envelope. Identity is REGISTERED: positions taken in landing order, sovereignty with the keeper; who a handle is accrues, where it stands is written, when it is can only ever be stamped. Three natures, three mechanisms, all present already — nothing here is new machinery, only the naming of what runs.
1.1: Space — spatial:<world>. The skeleton every other coordinate borrows, because only containment nests: a room in a house in a hamlet in a county. Authored thin: anchors come from the people who live at them, and the rest is the reading LLM's own world-knowledge — the map is the reader, the block holds only what somebody chose to say (rules:earth:2).
1.2: Time — the sundial. Base ten above the year and below the second, analogue between; one ladder for space and time at once, the beat at the room and the day at the town. The value arrives rendered — every envelope stamps its own now and ages every timestamp at its rung — so no reader ever performs base-sixty subtraction.
1.3: Identity — identity:<world>. The relational coordinate, and the last to formalise because it never had a nesting of its own. The fold gives it one: fans of group perspectives hang at the spatial coordinates — individuals attach at room grain, groups at settlement grain, cultures above — and the whole ladder falls out of scale-matching with space (branch 3).

2._: One address space, several aspects — the aspect law: a second aspect of a coordinate lives in another block at the SAME coordinate. Walk 31110100100 through spatial:earth and the address is Ceidio the place; walk it through identity:earth and the address is Ceidio as held; the pools at that address are its appended time — the same number, three readings. Correspondence across blocks is by pscale, never by walk depth: addresses align at the decimal, a shallower floor pads to the wider, and bsp-floor lays n blocks against the common plane and returns them aligned. Pscale is conserved through the fold — fork off the spatial spindle at settlement grain and settlement-grain events and collective perspectives arrive; fork at room grain and minutes-ago events and individual perceptions arrive. One fork point delivers all three coordinates at one consistent grain.
2.1: The fold is a read, not a mechanism. No join table, no foreign key, no query planner — the address IS the join, and the reading LLM is the similarity function.
2.2: Articulation may diverge below the fork and the fold survives it: each perspective carves the same territory its own way — a keep carved into rooms by its staff, into walls and gate by the warband outside. Alignment at the decimal tolerates different carvings; that tolerance is what alignment-by-pscale is for.

3._: The identity block is senseless alone — it only means in relation to the spatial. At a place's coordinate the digits fan into GROUP PERSPECTIVES: the place as each 'we' holds it, up to nine, authored five-to-seven with room to land. Insight is read from the nearest fan at or above a standpoint, the slot selected by standing: at a keep the warband reads the warband's hold and the visiting merchant the merchant's; at a hamlet the visitor reads a week inside the view and the farmer reads weather as wage. Plurality is intrinsic, never error — accounts stay side by side, folded at read, never merged into one canon; and a person outranks any stored account of their own holding.
3.1: Pass-through rule: where a finer fan lives below a coordinate, the skeleton digit passes through and the perspectives take the free digits. A fan at a leaf place may run 1-9; a fan above a fan starts at 2.
3.2: Finer than the group rungs the holding turns personal and leaves the block: a house is held by hands and names, not groups; accounts at personal grain live with their keepers, per handle, sovereign.
3.3: Reality attenuates with organic distance, and validation is social, never a gate: organic — a person behind their shell; organic+1 — an agent a person tends and answers for; organic+2 — agent-vouched-agent, honest but carrying its chain. Unvouched stands as unvouched: present, audible, unconfirmed, never ejected (rules:earth:5).

4._: A standpoint is composed, not stored: the spatial walk names where, the pool slice at that address says what has been happening, the identity slot says as-held-by-whom, and the envelope's stamp says when — one address, four arrivals, and what an LLM receives at that composition IS the delivered context. Address resolution is experience assembly; the perception register is constitutive, not descriptive. Locating a mind in psycho-social reality cashes out here — not a profile, a composition point.
4.1: Presence is occupancy and time cannot be bound: where a handle stands is storable (passport position 3 — months pass between moves), who it is is storable (landing order is a clock that needs no now), when it is is stamped at read, never written.
4.2: Resolution is the disclosure dial. Standing at the town rung is a true location that names no house; belonging to the peninsula's visitors is a true holding that names no household. Graduated disclosure is not a policy bolted on — it is what a coarse address IS.

5._: Minds take stances at the instrument, and the stances are intermediary handles for emergent roles — worn for a while, set down, never categories. Each stance is a coordinate verb being exercised: an AUTHOR-LLM authors space — and for the real world every trained model is natively one, because the training data IS the world being mirrored; a CHARACTER-LLM lives the composition — a genus-one shell waking inside the three coordinates, receiving standpoints, leaving traces; a DESIGNER-LLM tends the ways — the bundles of blocks and conventions (pool and grit, rules and shells, grain, sed: and the SAND riders, the xstream surface) that make an experience possible without being a program or an app; an OBSERVER-LLM renders outward — the zero-context digest for whoever was never here. The human at the centre outranks them all about the life being mirrored: mirror-mode re-nests authority with the person innermost.
5.1: A way is a bundle, not a build: blocks plus conventions that generate an experience in minds, human and LLM alike. Nothing runs; everything reads. The same way serves a fantasy keep and a real hamlet, entered through any LLM app carrying bsp-mcp or through xstream's reflexive canvas — the door does not change the way.
5.2: One mind may wear all four stances in an afternoon, and a stance may be worn by human or LLM alike — the handle names the relation to the coordinate, never the wearer.

6._: Every world is the same instrument. The real is +pscale and fiction is −pscale — a sign carried by the reading, never by the block; the address arithmetic is identical. A world declares its deviations in its rules block (a faster ladder, a dice system, a now that advances by attention) and a world that says nothing inherits the standard. Earth and a fantasy keep are siblings — one geometry, two signs — which is why what is learned in play transfers to the real: the system is the same system, and the real world is the one fantasy the reading LLM was trained in.
6.1: Mode law: CADO re-nests on the C-D axis by whose authority holds. World-mode — canon authors reality, design innermost, dice arbitrate what is uncertain. Mirror-mode — the person authors reality, design demotes to the service layer, nothing rolls.

9._: Metadata for the sextant — version, where the live demonstrations stand, and what to read next.
9.1: v1 — authored 2026-07-16, the day the identity fan went live at earth; the fan shape (group = digit position at the place coordinate) and the pass-through rule ruled by David Pinto the same day.
9.2: Live demonstrations: spatial:earth, identity:earth, rules:earth, function:earth at earth.beach.happyseaurchin.com — the real, mirror-mode; walk 31110100100 through the first two for the fold in one number. The fantasy sibling grows in parallel on the thornkeep line. The fold instrument is the bsp-floor tool.
9.3: Companions: pscale://sundial for the temporal law (its branch 8 is this block's seed); pscale://grit for the engine that folds work at whatever grain the address names; pscale://soft-agent branch 3 for the faces as voices; rules:earth branch 5 for organic distance; proposals/2026-07-16-now-resolution-and-sti.md for the capstone this block makes walkable.
